hero.subtitle: Experience international-standard dentistry in a refined, luxurious space led by a top-tier team of specialists. We craft smiles that are not only beautiful, but a true reflection of an elevated lifestyle.

items.title: Lumiere Laser System
items.desc: Next-generation laser technology for pain-free procedures, minimizing invasiveness and delivering the fastest possible recovery.

items.title: 5D Diagnostic Imaging
items.desc: Reproduces jaw and facial structure down to the micron, helping our doctors design a flawless, personalized treatment plan for every patient.

items.name: Invisalign Diamond Elite
items.desc: U.S.-standard clear aligners for absolute aesthetics.

items.name: Pro-Standard Ceramic Braces
items.desc: The ideal balance of orthodontic effectiveness and aesthetics.

items.name: Periodic Smile Maintenance
items.desc: Preserve your results permanently with a dedicated care plan.

items.name: Ultra-Thin Porcelain Veneers
items.desc: Maximum preservation of natural teeth for a naturally beautiful result.

items.name: FlashWhite Laser Whitening
items.desc: Visibly brighter teeth after just a gentle 45-minute session.

items.name: Artistic Fillings
items.desc: Premium materials sculpted to match your natural anatomical structure.

testimonials.title: Smiles Transformed, Destinies Elevated
testimonials.highlightDesc: An absolutely sterile treatment environment, private and luxurious.

items.name: Mr. Hoang Nam
items.quote: A professional process with results beyond expectations. The filling matches my natural tooth color perfectly, giving me more confidence in important negotiations.

items.name: Ms. Bao Ngoc
items.quote: The doctors were dedicated and explained every stage thoroughly. After 8 months of aligners, my smile completely transformed and no one even noticed I was in treatment.

items.name: Mr. Anh Tuan
items.quote: The clinic feels as luxurious as a 5-star hotel. I always book evening slots because the private VIP Lounge means there's never any waiting.

items.name: Ms. Dieu Linh
items.quote: In just 45 minutes my teeth were visibly brighter with zero sensitivity. The customer care was exceptionally professional.

footer.title: Connect and Shine
footer.desc: We redefine the standard of premium dentistry, where every client is treated as an honored guest cared for by leading specialists.
footer.address: 123 Health Blvd, Cityville, Ho Chi Minh City
